spacing_and_layout.touch_targets: Minimum h-14 or h-16 for all interactive elements. Add generous padding p-6 inside cards.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-md (max 8px) for structural elements. Keep sharp, clean edges.
spacing_and_layout.pos_layout: Split view: Left pane (70% width) for categories/products grid. Right pane (30% width) for sticky cart/ticket. Use flex or grid layout.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Control Room grid format: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6. Every metric clearly defined.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Crisp transition-transform active:scale-95 duration-100 ease-in-out for buttons (since touch is priority).
motion_and_interaction.active_states: High contrast focus rings: focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#002FA7] focus:ring-offset-2
motion_and_interaction.modals: Use Shadcn Dialog. Ensure it opens full screen on mobile, and centered large modal on tablet/desktop.

components.buttons: Large touch targets. Minimal gradients. Flat colors with subtle 1px border border-transparent.
components.product_card: Flat card, border-border, aspect-square or slightly tall. Image/Icon top, text bottom. No heavy shadow, just shadow-sm or border.
components.cart_item: Row layout. clear +/- touch controls on the right.
components.pin_pad: 3x4 grid of massive circular or square buttons (h-20 w-20) for rapid PIN entry.

media.icons: lucide-react for system icons. Phosphor icons for diverse products if needed.

instructions_to_main_agent: Prioritize iPad/Tablet layout: split screen for POS functionality. Use 70/30 or 60/40 width distribution.
Implement the PIN pad on the Auth screen using pure Tailwind grid.
Products need CRUD with stock and price. Use Shadcn tables for the admin views.
Checkout modal must offer Cash, Card, Mobile Money options prominently.
Dashboard must include Recharts (Bar/Line for sales over hours, Pie for categories).
Build a receipt preview view (modal) that visually mimics a thermal printed paper (monospace font, centered logo, dashed lines).

accessibility.data_testid: MANDATORY. Add data-testid to every button, input, and critical data display.
